testcase.name: validTokenAccessOk
testcase.system-out:
07:07:49.690 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.ipd.platform.controller.AuthControllerTest]: AuthControllerTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 07:07:49.840 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.ipd.platform.IpDPlatformApplication for test class com.ipd.platform.controller.AuthControllerTest 07:07:49.936 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.ipd.platform.controller.AuthControllerTest$ProtectedTests]: ProtectedTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 07:07:49.940 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.ipd.platform.IpDPlatformApplication for test class com.ipd.platform.controller.AuthControllerTest$ProtectedTests

testcase.name: invalidTokenReturns401
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-13T07:07:59.123+08:00 DEBUG 46480 --- [linglo-platform] [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Securing GET /auth/current 2026-04-13T07:07:59.124+08:00 ERROR 46480 --- [linglo-platform] [ main] c.i.platform.security.JwtTokenProvider : 无效的JWT Token: Invalid compact JWT string: Compact JWSs must contain exactly 2 period characters, and compact JWEs must contain exactly 4. Found: 0 2026-04-13T07:07:59.124+08:00 DEBUG 46480 --- [linglo-platform] [ main] o.s.s.w.a.AnonymousAuthenticationFilter : Set SecurityContextHolder to anonymous SecurityContext

testcase.name: noTokenReturns401
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-13T07:07:59.143+08:00 DEBUG 46480 --- [linglo-platform] [ main] o.s.security.web.FilterChainProxy : Securing GET /auth/current 2026-04-13T07:07:59.143+08:00 DEBUG 46480 --- [linglo-platform] [ main] o.s.s.w.a.AnonymousAuthenticationFilter : Set SecurityContextHolder to anonymous SecurityContext
